about.subTitle: About Us
about.title: 5 Years of Expertise in Global Expansion
about.description: SurmoX (Yueqian) was founded in 2019, focusing on providing foreign trade independent sites and WeChat mini program solutions for cross-border e-commerce sellers and SMEs. We understand the pain points of high platform fees and changing rules, and are committed to making independent site building simpler, more affordable, and more efficient.

items.title: Foreign Trade Site
items.description: Shopify alternative, built for cross-border e-commerce. Supports PayPal, Stripe and other payment methods, responsive design, SEO-friendly, 3-15 day fast launch to help you expand into global markets.

items.title: WeChat Mini Program
items.description: Private traffic operation tool covering all scenarios: shopping mall, showcase, and utility types. Supports WeChat Pay, membership system, distribution & group buying to boost brand private domain operations and user retention.
checklist: Distribution & Group Buying for Viral Growth
